description: Create a 3D stepped shaft by revolving a 2D half-profile 360 degrees around the vertical axis. The profile is a closed polygon with vertices at A(0, 0), B(15, 0), C(15, 5), D(8, 5), E(8, 25), and F(0, 25), where the edge F-A lies along the Y-axis. Save the project to ~/Documents/SolveSpace/stepped_shaft.slvs and export the 3D model as a triangle mesh to ~/Documents/SolveSpace/stepped_shaft.stl.
